name: Adastra
description: Engage with a trusted AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft partner that will help you maximize your investments in AI and machine learning. OUR PORTFOLIO: AI Strategy and AI Governance, Generative AI, Predictive Analytics and Machine Learning, Computer Vision, Hyperautomation, ML Ops and AI Platforms.

name: Tableau
description: Tableau is a software publisher that specializes in data analytics, business intelligence, and data visualization. Their advanced analytics solutions allow users to explore and visualize large datasets through intuitive dashboards, empowering organizations to become more data-driven.

name: Snowflake
description: Snowflake is a service provider that delivers the Data Cloud, enabling organizations to mobilize data with exceptional scale and performance. It offers a platform that supports diverse analytic workloads, facilitating data discovery and empowering businesses to gain insights and leverage data-driven opportunities.

name: ACL Digital
description: The company, ACL Digital, specializes in analytics and data, providing expert consulting that enhances organizational capabilities and offers technology solutions. They focus on helping clients gain intelligence and speed through innovative products and digital transformation strategies.

name: Tiger Analytics
description: The company, Tiger Analytics, specializes in advanced analytics and AI consulting services, utilizing diverse teams to tackle complex business challenges through data-driven solutions. Their collaborative approach integrates various expertise, including data scientists and engineers, to create innovative strategies that deliver long-term value for clients.

name: ACE Analytics
description: Ace Analytics specializes in data analysis, helping organizations extract valuable insights from raw data to make informed decisions.

name: Analytics Private Limited
description: The company emphasizes its commitment to a data-driven culture, utilizing data analytics to generate actionable insights and improve decision-making. By integrating artificial intelligence and machine learning, they enhance product features and automate processes, ultimately helping organizations drive value and growth.

name: Salesforce
description: The company specializes in enterprise software solutions that enhance sales and customer support, incorporating data analytics to provide insights through reports and dashboards. Their offerings include a Service Cloud and tools for sales automation and CRM, all designed to streamline processes and facilitate informed decision-making with advanced analytics capabilities.

name: GoodData
description: GoodData offers a comprehensive data analytics platform designed to empower organizations with modern business intelligence. With a focus on creating shareable insights and facilitating data-driven decision-making, GoodData provides a wide range of features that simplify data visualization and reporting for users.

name: Digital Consulting Studio
description: The company specializes in marketing and advertising solutions, offering services that include data analytics to enhance their clients' marketing efforts.
